text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wow. Today is, like... out of control.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
My nails are on point, and I got my bangs just
right on the first go. Nothing can touch me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: It's like I'm invincible or something.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Just watch today's trends. They're all gonna be
about me!
